creator: jflopezfernandez@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 219848
Patch file modifying the MAINTAINER field

Good evening,

The current binutils port version (2.33.1) is now over a year behind its upstream counterpart (2.35.1), and since this port currently lacks a maintainer, I would like to volunteer myself to take over this responsibility.

Attached you will find the patch containing the edit to the maintainer field, as specified in the contribution documentation. This patch does not contain the version upgrade, as I thought it prudent to await further guidance before moving forward.

Thank you for your consideration,
Jose
